_comment: Fixed vibe vocabulary. Every bar.vibe_tags entry MUST be one of these strings. Every user's vibe preference MUST be a weight over this vocabulary. Adding or removing entries is a breaking change — regenerate bars.json and invalidate saved user preferences if you edit this file.

notes.opposing_pairs: Used by the scoring engine to detect incoherent vibe profiles — if a user weights both sides of an opposing pair highly, the system flags this in the explanation ('You want both intimate and rowdy; we weighted intimate higher because it pairs with your other preferences').
notes.facet_weighting: The scoring engine can normalize weights per facet to prevent a user's atmosphere preferences from swamping their identity preferences.
notes.no_drink_type_vibes: Drink preferences (whiskey, beer, wine) live on Bar.drink_specialties and UserPreference.preferred_drinks, not here. Vibes describe atmosphere and purpose only.
